name: viz-gateway
description: Federated multisig gateway between VIZ and remote chains (TON, Solana, ...): lock VIZ, mint wrapped VIZ.

scripts.verify: node tools/threshold-calc.mjs && node tools/viz-multisig-spike.cjs && node tools/ton-notification-spike.cjs && node tools/writepaths-spike.cjs && node tools/orchestration-spike.cjs && node tools/rotation-spike.cjs && node tools/ton-rotation-spike.cjs && node tools/solana-rotation-spike.cjs && node tools/solana-writepath-spike.cjs && node tools/solana-orchestration-spike.cjs && node tools/solana-innerix-spike.cjs && node tools/outbox-spike.cjs && node tools/dispatcher-policy-spike.cjs && node tools/fee-viz-spike.cjs && node tools/pegout-address-spike.cjs && node tools/pegout-guard-spike.cjs && node tools/signer-f2-spike.cjs && node tools/idempotent-delivery-spike.cjs && node contracts/ton/tools/verify-offline.cjs
